def process_order(order):
    # If order is from a VIP customer and the total exceeds $500
    # and the item is not backordered, apply a discount
    if order.customer.tier == "vip":
        if order.total > 500:
            if not order.item.backordered:
                order.discount = order.total * 0.1
            else:
                order.discount = 0
        else:
            order.discount = 0
    else:
        order.discount = 0

    # Check if we should expedite shipping
    # VIP customers with priority items get free express
    if order.customer.tier == "vip":
        if order.item.priority:
            if order.shipping_zone == "domestic":
                order.shipping = "express_free"
            else:
                order.shipping = "express_discounted"
        else:
            order.shipping = "standard"
    else:
        order.shipping = "standard"

    return order
